title: gentianella montana var. stolonifera
intro: Gentianella montana var. stolonifera is a perennial plant species that belongs to the gentian family, known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. It is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to provide relief from various health issues. The plant's extracts have been traditionally used to treat digestive problems, such as nausea and indigestion, as well as to alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Gentianella montana var. stolonifera can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
